title: Currency picker
description: ISO 4217 currency picker. Defaults to tenant.default_currency. Entitlement-aware — disables non-default currencies on Small tier without invoice_multi_currency. Used in the invoice create wizard + the invoice list filter + the credit-note create wizard.

showFullList.description: true = show all ISO 4217 currencies. false = show the tenant's configured currency set from settings.invoice.enabled_currencies.

dataSources.name: currencies
dataSources.description: Returns [{ code, name, symbol }] from the tax module's currency catalogue.

helpText.text: Multi-currency invoicing requires Medium tier. Upgrade to invoice in currencies other than {tenant.default_currency}.
